backlog.title: Establish Customer Success Metrics Dashboard
backlog.description: Create a dashboard to track key Customer Success metrics including NPS, CSAT, churn rate, and adoption rates.

backlog.title: Document Current Customer Support Processes
backlog.description: Audit and document existing customer support workflows, tools, and escalation paths.

backlog.title: Create Customer Health Scoring System
backlog.description: Develop a system to score customer health based on usage patterns, support tickets, and engagement.

prospects.title: Implement Customer Success Platform Integration
prospects.description: Evaluate and integrate a Customer Success Platform (CSP) for automated workflows.
prospects.business_case: Improve efficiency and scalability of CS operations
